baseline_observed.last_commit: 70d8ff3 feat: compress compliance release decision room

short_understanding.core_goal: Aus Screenshot-Audit, P0 Process Universe und Codebase-Reality einen BoC-konformen, CTES-bewerteten Umsetzungsplan erzeugen, der nicht nur Layoutsymptome kaschiert, sondern die App prozess-first bis zur Implementierung führt.
short_understanding.reason: Audit und Process Universe zeigen systemische P0-Gaps; die Codebase hat zwar Shells, Master-Detail, Gate-Rails und Safety-Tests, aber deren Anwendung ist noch inkonsistent. Mehrere Tasks benötigen Spezifikation, Route-/Screen-Split-Entscheidung und QA vor Umsetzung.
short_understanding.minimum_epic_count_assessment: Mindestens 10 Epics sind gerechtfertigt. Der Audit liefert 10 Recommendations und 6 Cluster; das Process Universe liefert 12 P0-Domänen und 11 Gaps. Unter 10 Epics würde entweder Process-Gaps vermischen oder UI-Refactorings ohne Prozessverantwortung bündeln.

audit.dominant_issue: Long-screen process complexity, mixed page jobs, and competing status/action hierarchy.
top_p0_screens: S055-S058 export stepper screens near or above long-page threshold

process_universe.all_domains_status: PARTIALLY_IMPLEMENTED or STRONG_PARTIAL/UNKNOWN in coverage section

main_gaps: WorksurfaceShell still permits freeform stacking through primary, secondary and children.
MasterDetailSurface exists but is not consistently the mandatory pattern for long P0 queues.
StatusChip is a static status summary, not the normalized blocking/attention/info/completed language requested by the audit.
Proof/audit placement exists in template contracts but still allows primary-detail inflation on decision rooms.
Export screen has active uncommitted compression work and must be reconciled before further tickets.

delivery_chain_decision.recommended_structure: Multiple Epics with full delivery chain
critical_path: EPIC-12 capture, tests and release proof

decision_gates.title: Approve Process-First UX Contract
decision_gates.recommendation: Approve strict shell enforcement, one primary page job, and long-screen split/exception ledger before broad UI edits.

decision_gates.title: Resolve Export Dirty State
decision_gates.recommendation: Salvage and finish the current export compression work if it passes source review; do not layer unrelated export work on top before reconciliation.

decision_gates.title: Route/Screen Split Authority
decision_gates.recommendation: Allow route-level detail or split-view migration only where True-UX route evolution records and tests are added.

decision_gates.title: Schema Freeze Unless Proven Necessary
decision_gates.recommendation: Keep schema changes out of this plan by default; only open schema work if a P0 proof task shows a real missing persistence contract.

ctes_policy.scale: C + S + U + V + R, each 0-4

epics.title: Baseline, Traceability and Source Authority Lock
epics.purpose: Create the process-to-screen-to-code map before any implementation so audit findings, P0 processes and current code are not mixed by assumption.

tasks.title: Build current traceability matrix
tasks.description: Map audit screens, P0 processes, route IDs, components, services and tests into one implementation traceability matrix.
subtasks: Map S029/S038/S035/S044/S048/S051/S055-S058 to routes and owning components.
Map BP domains A-L to route touchpoints and existing tests.
Classify each item as implemented, partial, visual-only, specified-only or missing.
definition_of_done: Every P0 audit target has an owning route/component/test row.
Dirty export file is explicitly marked as current baseline risk.
No implementation task is marked ready without traceability.

tasks.title: Define executable Process-First UX contract
tasks.description: Turn traceability into acceptance rules: one page job, one command zone, proof layer placement, long-screen thresholds and exception ledger.
subtasks: Lock thresholds: over 3000px needs anchors or exception; over 3400px MVP workflow needs split or approved exception.
Define page-job taxonomy: queue, detail, decision, stepper, audit/reference, confirmation.
Define proof/audit placement rules by page family.
definition_of_done: Contract has concrete acceptance criteria for shell, queue, decision, stepper and confirmation surfaces.
Implementation boundaries respect True-UX no screen/image generation and route evolution policy.

tasks.title: Validate baseline and planning artifacts
tasks.description: Review traceability and contract against BoC structural sanity rules before implementation begins.
definition_of_done: All implementation tickets have dependencies and CTES.
All CTES 13+ work is split or kept as spec/analysis.

epics.title: Process-First Worksurface Shell and Long-Screen Governance
epics.purpose: Harden the existing shell/template system so P0 workflow screens cannot keep growing as append-only vertical pages.

tasks.title: Specify strict shell slot contract
tasks.description: Define required shell slots and forbid uncontrolled primary+secondary+children stacking on P0 workflows.
subtasks: Define allowed zones per page family.
Define command-zone uniqueness rule.
Define proof-audit zone placement and collapse rules.

tasks.title: Harden WorksurfaceShell and template records
tasks.description: Update shared shell/template contracts so long-screen governance becomes enforceable in source and tests.

subtasks.title: Add typed pageJob and activeStep metadata
Restrict freeform children on productive P0 templates
Add long-screen exception metadata and test hooks

tasks.title: Source-level shell governance tests
tasks.description: Extend current shell and page-template tests to fail if P0 screens regress to unbounded stacking.

epics.title: Master-Detail Queue Workbench Migration
epics.purpose: Move long queue screens from stacked list+detail+audit pages into scannable process workbenches.

tasks.title: Define QueueWorkbench adoption contract
tasks.description: Specify a shared queue pattern: dense master list, selected detail, action rail, proof drawer, preserved selection.
subtasks: Define required data attributes and selection-state behavior.
Define dense row field priorities.
Define audit/proof drawer handoff.

tasks.title: Migrate severe P0 queues S029 and S038 first
tasks.description: Refactor extraction review and compliance release queue into MasterDetailSurface-based workbenches.

subtasks.title: S029 evidence extraction review queue split
S038 compliance release queue split
Move audit/history payload to secondary drawer or tab

tasks.title: Migrate secondary queue surfaces
tasks.description: Apply the pattern to advisor, vault, governance users and access request queues.

subtasks.title: S034/S036 advisor and analyst queue cleanup
S046 evidence vault master-detail cleanup
S048/S050 governance and access queues cleanup

tasks.title: Queue workbench regression and screenshot proof
tasks.description: Run source tests, route smoke and screenshots for migrated queue screens; compare height and first-viewport action visibility.

epics.title: Evidence, Document and Sufficiency Lifecycle Workbench
epics.purpose: Turn evidence upload/review from visual presence into process-first sufficiency lifecycle with no upload-to-release shortcut.

tasks.title: Evidence sufficiency lifecycle lock
tasks.description: Define request, upload, metadata validation, extraction review, linkage, sufficiency decision and re-request as separate states.
subtasks: Define BP-023 through BP-033 acceptance states.
Define what can and cannot appear in client-safe evidence summaries.
Define negative cases for upload-only and insufficient evidence.

tasks.title: Compress and process-wire evidence screens
tasks.description: Apply evidence lifecycle states to document review, verification pending, vault and record detail surfaces.

subtasks.title: S029 extraction review workbench implementation
S030 verification pending proof summary implementation
S046/S047 vault and detail secondary proof layer

tasks.title: Evidence positive and negative proof
tasks.description: Extend document upload/evidence review tests so sufficiency cannot be implied by upload, extraction or visual proof alone.

epics.title: Signal, Analyst Workbench and Internal Draft Governance
epics.purpose: Separate internal signals and draft work from client-visible advice while reducing trigger review page overload.

tasks.title: Internal draft and unsupported-claim contract
tasks.description: Specify draft classification, unsupported-claim rejection, rebuild-with-evidence and internal-only projection rules.
subtasks: Map BP-034, BP-038, BP-039, BP-040, BP-041 and BP-042-BP-048 to screens.
Define no-client-leak rules for draft and analyst notes.
Define blocked/recovery states for missing evidence.

tasks.title: Refactor trigger review S035 into decision room with proof drawer

subtasks.title: Move raw evidence/audit sections out of primary stack
Add single current analyst command zone

epics.title: Advisor Review and Compliance Release Separation
epics.purpose: Make advisor approval visibly and technically distinct from compliance release, with process gates that do not overclaim client visibility.

tasks.title: Advisor-not-release and compliance-release lock
tasks.description: Lock advisor approval as human review only and compliance as release gate requiring evidence, permission and audit preconditions.

subtasks.title: S036 advisor queue master-detail
S037 advisor detail command hierarchy
S038 compliance queue master-detail
S039/S040/S041 release, confirm and block gates
S042 audit surface as secondary proof layer

tasks.title: Advisor/compliance positive and negative proof
tasks.description: Prove advisor approval never releases to client; compliance release fails closed if evidence, visibility, permission or audit preconditions fail.

epics.title: Decision Record, Evidence Vault and Audit Failure Semantics
epics.purpose: Make decision records audit-ready without turning every decision/audit screen into a massive always-visible proof page.

tasks.title: Decision/audit proof layer contract
tasks.description: Define decision creation, rationale, status transitions, vault links, audit display and failure semantics.

tasks.title: Compress decision room and audit surfaces

subtasks.title: S044 decision record room split into current decision and proof drawer
S047 evidence detail proof layering
S048/S051 governance/audit surfaces density cleanup

epics.title: Export, Redaction and Delivery Stepper Completion
epics.purpose: Finish export as a hard-bounded process stepper: scope, redact, approve, package/download, with forbidden payload proof.

tasks.title: Reconcile current dirty export implementation
tasks.description: Decide whether to salvage, finish or replace the current uncommitted export compression diff.
tasks.recommendation: Salvage and finish if source review confirms the diff only compresses export boundaries and does not weaken safety gates.

tasks.title: Export lifecycle and forbidden payload lock
subtasks: Define scope step as not redaction.
Define redaction step as not approval.
Define approval step as not download/share.
Define package/download step as not client acceptance.
Define forbidden payload negative tests.

subtasks.title: S055 scope screen active-step boundary
S056 redaction control panel and proof drawer
S057 approval command gate and short confirmation
S058 package/download/share final gate

tasks.title: Export safety, screenshot and API proof

epics.title: Identity, RBAC, Admin Non-Bypass and Role/Payload Matrix
epics.purpose: Close the P0 governance foundation so admin and role surfaces are process-capable without becoming safety bypasses.

tasks.title: RBAC/action/payload/admin non-bypass matrix
tasks.description: Create the matrix for current user, tenant membership, role, object scope, payload visibility, second confirmation and denied-action audit.
subtasks: Separate route access from action authority.
Separate action authority from payload visibility.
Separate admin configuration from release/evidence/advice bypass.

tasks.title: Compact admin surfaces and enforce non-bypass feedback

subtasks.title: S007 platform settings compact template
S009 permission modal as short command gate
S048/S050 governance master-detail and access recovery

epics.title: Client Visibility and Client-Safe Projection
epics.purpose: Ensure client-facing views, summaries and exports are released-only, redacted and fail-closed.

tasks.title: Client visibility projection allowlist
tasks.description: Define released-only projection, redaction allowlist, hidden states, mobile-safe view and forbidden internal payloads.

tasks.title: Wire client-safe projection cues into UI and services

subtasks.title: Client workspace released-only summary state
Decision record client-safe projection labels
Export package no-leak projection proof

tasks.title: No-leakage and fail-closed client projection tests

epics.title: Status, Action and Confirmation Design-System Primitives
epics.purpose: Replace competing chips, warnings and long modals with a typed status/action/confirmation language.

tasks.title: Typed status and command hierarchy
tasks.description: Define blocking, attention, informational and completed statuses; every blocker must expose reason and recovery action.

tasks.title: Extend status/action primitives and short confirmation gate

subtasks.title: StatusChip severity semantics extension
BlockerPanel with reason and recovery action
ConfirmationGate component for short final-command modals

epics.title: Hold, Deferred, Reference and Ops/Data-Quality Differentiation
epics.purpose: Stop hold/reference routes from looking like finished process surfaces while preserving route identity and future-product clarity.

tasks.title: HoldSurface and support-process rules
tasks.description: Define reason, owner, next decision, future job and no-overclaim wording for hold/deferred/reference screens.

subtasks.title: Add route-specific first-viewport job summaries
Add decision-needed and owner metadata
Differentiate ops/data-quality support routes

epics.title: End-to-End P0 QA, Capture Burndown and Release Evidence
epics.purpose: Prove the process-first refactor with tests, new screenshots, long-screen deltas and positive/negative safety proof.

tasks.title: P0 acceptance and capture burndown matrix
tasks.description: Define the final proof matrix: source tests, Playwright flows, screenshots, max-height deltas, first-viewport action visibility and negative safety cases.

tasks.title: Run validation suite and screens-only recapture

subtasks.title: Run pnpm guard:source and targeted source tests
Run P0 safety and export/client-visibility tests
Run new screens-only capture and compare long-screen metrics

tasks.title: Produce final implementation proof report
tasks.description: Create final report with changed files, inspected files, screenshots, positive/negative acceptance, deviations, blockers and next recommended phase.

double_diamond.discover: Audit evidence, Process Universe gaps and codebase seams were separated.
double_diamond.define: The real problem is process job overload, not only screen height.
double_diamond.develop: The plan uses shell hardening, master-detail migration, proof layering, stepper enforcement and safety QA.
double_diamond.deliver: 12 epics with CTES-scored tasks/subtasks and explicit dependencies.

psycho_logic_map_model.rational_logic: Users need clear next permitted action, release safety and audit proof.
psycho_logic_map_model.psycho_logic: Dense proof everywhere creates safety theater and orientation loss; trust improves when gates are explicit and recovery paths are visible.
psycho_logic_map_model.map_trap: Status chips and visible audit sections are being mistaken for process completion.
psycho_logic_map_model.design_move: Make gate state, actor authority, blocker reason and proof access separate visible primitives.

triz_contradictions: Need more compliance proof without longer pages: solve with proof drawer and concise sufficiency state.
Need safety confirmation without confirmation fatigue: solve with short ConfirmationGate and underlying decision evidence.
Need many P0 processes without monster screens: solve with master-detail, steppers and route/split governance.
sit_closed_world: Reuse WorksurfaceShell but restrict slot contract.
Reuse MasterDetailSurface but make it mandatory for P0 queues.
Reuse ProcessGateRail as primary process-state primitive.
Reuse existing tests and add stricter negative assertions.
Reuse screens-only capture as burndown evidence.

weak_branches_killed.reason: Would hide Process Universe P0 gaps and keep safety ambiguity.
Would mask structural debt instead of migrating target surfaces.
Process Universe explicitly does not authorize schema changes by itself.
CTES and BoC rules require splitting because risk, scope and verification are too high.

measurement_plan: Max severe P0 screen height reduced or explicitly exception-recorded.
S029 and S038 converted from stacked queues to master-detail workbenches.
S055-S058 show one active export job per step.
All blockers show reason plus recovery action.
Positive and negative P0 proof tests pass before acceptance.

ethics_and_fairness.limitations: This is a read-only plan derived from inspected artifacts and source snippets. It does not claim implementation completion.

recommended_first_execution_ticket.reason: It resolves traceability and dirty-baseline risk before implementation.
recommended_first_execution_ticket.after_completion_next: EPIC-00-SPEC-01, then DEC-001 approval of the strict Process-First UX Contract.
